AC1.description: PUT /api/forms/:formId/fields persists the updated schema and increments the version number
AC1.notes: Existing behavior retained; version increments on each PUT /fields call. Tests confirm version goes 1→2→3.

AC2.description: Each save creates a new version entry in the in-memory store with version number and timestamp
AC2.notes: versionHistory array added to FormRecord; each PUT /fields appends a VersionEntry with {version, savedAt, fieldCount, isPublished}.

AC3.description: POST /api/forms/:formId/publish marks the current version as 'published' and sets it as the active schema
AC3.notes: POST /api/forms/:formId/publish endpoint added. Creates publishedSchemaStore snapshot, updates formRecord.status='published', formRecord.publishedSchemaId, formRecord.publishedAt.

AC4.description: Publish returns a success response with { formId, version, status: 'published', publishedAt }
AC4.notes: Route returns exact shape: {formId, version, status: 'published', publishedAt}. Tested in publish.test.ts.

AC5.description: GET /api/forms/:formId/schema returns the active published schema as JSON
AC5.notes: GET /schema now reads from publishedSchemaStore. Returns published schema with {formId, title, version, status:'published', fields, publishedAt}.

AC6.description: GET /api/forms/:formId/schema returns 404 if no published version exists for the formId
AC6.notes: Returns 404 SCHEMA_NOT_PUBLISHED when record.publishedSchemaId is null. Tested in both api.test.ts and publish.test.ts.

AC7.description: Response includes metadata: formId, version, publishedAt, title
AC7.notes: All four fields included in GET /schema response. publish.test.ts verifies all four.

AC8.description: Publish button added to the form editor UI using govuk-frontend button component
AC8.notes: Added govuk-button govuk-button--secondary 'Publish form' button to EditorPage.tsx with id='publish-button'.

AC9.description: After publishing, a GOV.UK success notification banner is shown
AC9.notes: govuk-notification-banner govuk-notification-banner--success shown after successful publish with version number message.

AC10.description: Form dashboard shows 'Published' status badge next to published forms
AC10.notes: DashboardPage statusTag() updated to include 'published' → govuk-tag--blue with 'Published' label.

AC11.description: Backend unit tests cover: save with version increment, publish, serve published schema, 404 for missing
AC11.notes: publish.test.ts has 25+ tests covering all four scenarios. All 90 tests pass. Coverage: branches 80.2% >= 80%.

BUG1.description: Frontend build clean - no asset resolution warnings
BUG1.notes: Copied GOV.UK Frontend fonts and images to frontend/public/assets/. Build now completes with zero warnings. Fonts served at /assets/fonts/*, images at /assets/images/*.

BUG2.notes: Actual .woff and .woff2 font files now present at expected absolute path /assets/fonts/ so browser can decode them correctly. No more OTS parsing errors.
